things.name: Magellan's Cross
things.description: Cross planted by Ferdinand Magellan on his arrival in 1521 - earliest symbol of Christianity in Asia

things.name: Whale Shark Swimming (Oslob)
things.description: Swim with the world's largest fish - whale sharks congregate at Oslob south of Cebu

things.name: Basilica Minore del Santo Nino
things.description: Oldest Roman Catholic church in the Philippines housing the Santo Nino statue

things.name: Kawasan Falls & Canyoneering
things.description: Turquoise waterfall with exhilarating canyoneering jumps through the Badian Canyon

things.name: Tumalog Falls
things.description: Silky cascade waterfall near Oslob surrounded by jungle

things.name: Tops Lookout
things.description: Panoramic hilltop views over Cebu City, Mactan Island and the surrounding sea

things.name: Temple of Leah
things.description: Cebu's Taj Mahal-inspired monument built by a man for his late wife

things.name: Simala Church
things.description: Castle-like hilltop church with a miraculous image of the Blessed Virgin Mary

things.name: Mactan Island Beach Resorts
things.description: Resort island of the city accessible by bridge with dive sites and beach clubs

things.name: Lechon de Cebu
things.description: Cebu's famous whole roasted pig - the best lechon in the Philippines
